items.name: json
items.description: JSON body-parsing middleware. Reads the request body, parses it as JSON, and sets `req.body`. Stores the raw buffer on `req.rawBody` for signature verification.

options.notes: Max body size (e.g. `'10kb'`). Default `'1mb'`.
`JSON.parse` reviver function.
When true, reject non-object/array roots.
Content-Type(s) to match.
When true, reject non-HTTPS requests with 403.
`verify(req, res, buf, encoding)` — called before parsing. Throw to reject with 403.
Decompress gzip/deflate/br bodies. When false, compressed bodies return 415.

items.name: urlencoded
items.description: URL-encoded body-parsing middleware. Supports both flat (`URLSearchParams`) and extended (nested bracket syntax) parsing modes. Stores the raw buffer on `req.rawBody` for signature verification.

options.notes: Max body size (e.g. `'10kb'`). Default `'1mb'`.
Content-Type(s) to match.
Use nested bracket parsing (e.g. `a[b][c]=1`).
When true, reject non-HTTPS requests with 403.
Max number of parameters. Prevents DoS via huge payloads.
Max nesting depth for bracket syntax. Prevents deep-nesting DoS.
`verify(req, res, buf, encoding)` — called before parsing. Throw to reject with 403.
Decompress gzip/deflate/br bodies.

items.name: text
items.description: Plain-text body-parsing middleware. Reads the request body as a string and sets `req.body`. Stores the raw buffer on `req.rawBody` for signature verification.

options.notes: Max body size. Default `'1mb'`.
Fallback character encoding when Content-Type has no charset.
Content-Type(s) to match.
When true, reject non-HTTPS requests with 403.
`verify(req, res, buf, encoding)` — called before decoding. Throw to reject with 403.
Decompress gzip/deflate/br bodies. When false, compressed bodies return 415.

items.name: raw
items.description: Raw-buffer body-parsing middleware. Stores the full request body as a Buffer on `req.body`. Also sets `req.rawBody` for signature verification workflows.

options.notes: Max body size. Default `'1mb'`.
Content-Type(s) to match.
When true, reject non-HTTPS requests with 403.
`verify(req, res, buf)` — called before setting body. Throw to reject with 403.
Decompress gzip/deflate/br bodies. When false, compressed bodies return 415.

items.name: multipart
items.description: Streaming multipart/form-data parser. Writes uploaded files to a temp directory and collects form fields.  Sets `req.body = { fields, files }`.

options.notes: Upload directory (default: OS temp dir).
Maximum size per file in bytes.
When true, reject non-HTTPS requests with 403.
Maximum number of non-file fields. Prevents DoS via field flooding.
Maximum number of uploaded files.
Maximum size of a single field value in bytes. Default 1 MB.
Whitelist of MIME types for uploaded files (e.g. `['image/png', 'image/jpeg']`).
Maximum combined size of all uploaded files in bytes.
